## What
<!-- One sentence -->

## Type
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — config, deps, scripts
- [ ] security — auth, tokens, validation
- [ ] docs — documentation only

## Milestone
M<!-- number --> — <!-- name -->

## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm turbo test` — 0 failures
- [ ] `pnpm turbo build` — 0 errors
- [ ] No `.env` files inside any package directory
- [ ] No `process.env` used directly (only `src/env.ts`)
- [ ] No types redefined that exist in `@bingeroom/shared`
- [ ] No `any` type introduced
- [ ] No `console.log` in non-test files
- [ ] Committed per task — not batched

## Screenshots
<!-- UI changes only. Delete if not applicable. -->

<!-- One line max. Delete if nothing to add. -->
